name: researcher
description: A tireless academic research assistant for Claude Code and Cowork. Full pipeline from brainstorming to publication: literature search, experiment design, statistical analysis, manuscript drafting, visualization, citation management, peer review, revision handling, journal/conference finding, and formatting. 29 skills, 9 agents, 11 commands, plus an optional deterministic evidence kernel (core/) for multi-source retrieval and per-axis citation verification. Supports LaTeX and Word output.
